schedules.name: 高风险基金每日晨报
schedules.description: 每天上午9点发送高风险基金监控提醒

schedules.name: 高风险基金午间检查
schedules.description: 每天中午12点检查高风险基金表现
schedules.command: cd /root/Github/asset-lens && source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "from datetime import datetime; print(f'📊 高风险基金午间检查 - {datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M")}')"

schedules.name: 高风险基金收盘总结
schedules.description: 每天下午4点生成高风险基金收盘报告

schedules.name: 中高风险基金周报
schedules.description: 每周五下午5点生成中高风险基金周报
schedules.command: cd /root/Github/asset-lens && source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "import json; from datetime import datetime; data = {'report_time': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'), 'type': 'weekly_high_risk_report'}; print(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))"
